title: OTR Trust Manifest v3
description: Machine-readable trust declaration published by merchants at /.well-known/otr/trust.json. This schema defines the complete trust manifest format including optional signed envelope, verification evidence, entity data, and data source provenance.

TrustManifest.title: OTR Trust Manifest (unsigned)
TrustManifest.description: A trust manifest without cryptographic signature. Consumers SHOULD prefer signed manifests when available.

version.description: Schema version. MUST start with '3.' for OTR v3 manifests.

domain.description: Merchant domain name (e.g., 'example.com'). MUST NOT include protocol or path.

trustScore.description: Composite trust score. Range [0, 94]. Scores 95+ are reserved for manual review and MUST NOT appear in manifests.

badge.description: Trust badge level derived from trustScore. PLATINUM (90-94), GOLD (80-89), SILVER (70-79), BRONZE (60-69), UNRATED (0-59).

tier.description: Machine-readable trust tier. TIER_5=PLATINUM, TIER_4=GOLD, TIER_3=SILVER, TIER_2=BRONZE, TIER_1=UNRATED.

assessmentType.description: Assessment phase. PUBLIC_ASSESSMENT uses 4 dimensions with publicly verifiable data. VERIFIED_MERCHANT uses all 7 dimensions with merchant-provided API data.

dataConfidence.description: Data confidence label (display-only, does NOT affect scoring). HIGH_CONFIDENCE: >=3 months data. LOW_CONFIDENCE: 1-3 months. INSUFFICIENT: <1 month.

dataSources.description: List of data sources used to compute this trust assessment. Provides provenance for auditability.

trancoRank.description: Tranco domain popularity rank. 1 = most popular. null if not ranked.

isMerchantAuthorized.description: Whether the merchant has authorized OTR via API integration (Verified Merchant status).

orbexaStoreUrl.description: URL to the merchant's ORBEXA store page, if available.

auditVersion.description: Audit version number. Incremented each time the merchant is re-assessed.

lastVerified.description: Timestamp of the last trust assessment (ISO 8601).

issuedAt.description: Manifest issuance timestamp (ISO 8601). The time this manifest was generated.

expiresAt.description: Manifest expiration timestamp (ISO 8601). Consumers MUST NOT use manifests past this date. SHOULD be no more than 30 days from issuedAt.

issuer.description: Issuer identifier. The validator that produced this assessment (e.g., 'orbexa.io').

issuerKeyId.description: Public key identifier for signature verification. References the issuer's signing key.

SignedTrustManifest.title: OTR Signed Trust Manifest
SignedTrustManifest.description: A trust manifest wrapped in a cryptographic signature envelope using ECDSA P-256. The signature covers the canonical JSON serialization of the manifest object.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded ECDSA P-256 signature over the SHA-256 hash of the canonical JSON serialization of the manifest object.

keyId.description: Public key identifier. Used to retrieve the issuer's public key for signature verification.

algorithm.description: Signature algorithm. MUST be ES256 (ECDSA using P-256 and SHA-256).

TrustDimensions.title: Trust Dimension Scores
TrustDimensions.description: Individual scores for all 7 trust dimensions. Each score is in the range [0, 100].

identity.description: Identity credibility score. Measures unforgeable brand identity signals (SEC filings, Wikidata, Tranco rank, company age).

technical.description: Technical security score. Measures DNS/SSL security configuration (DMARC, SPF, DKIM, HSTS, SSL type).

compliance.description: Compliance certification score. Status-based scoring (VERIFIED=85, PARTIAL=72, INFERRED=50, PENDING=0).

policyScore.description: Policy completeness score. Measures consumer policy pages (privacy, refund, terms, cookie consent).

webPresence.description: Web presence professionalism score. Measures website quality and AI discoverability (Schema.org, sitemap, robots.txt).

dataQuality.description: Data quality score. Measures product catalog completeness (requires Verified Merchant API integration).

fulfillment.description: Fulfillment capability score. Measures order fulfillment performance (requires Verified Merchant API integration).

AntiGamingResult.title: Anti-Gaming Detection Result
AntiGamingResult.description: Result of anti-gaming analysis. Included when gaming patterns are detected (severity != CLEAN).

severity.description: Overall gaming severity. CLEAN: no patterns. SUSPICIOUS: moderate indicators. LIKELY_GAMING: strong indicators.

multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to gameable dimensions (Technical, PolicyScore, WebPresence). 1.0 = no adjustment.

patterns.description: List of detected gaming patterns with human-readable descriptions.

VerificationData.title: Verification Evidence
VerificationData.description: Detailed verification evidence for each trust dimension. Provides provenance and evidence descriptions for auditability.

tiers.description: Verification tier details for each dimension.

scanMetadata.description: Metadata about the scanning process that produced this assessment.

TierDetail.title: Verification Tier Detail
TierDetail.description: Verification evidence for a single dimension.

evidence.description: Human-readable evidence description (e.g., 'Stock: NYSE, Wikidata verified, Corporate registry verified').

EntityData.title: Entity Data
EntityData.description: Corporate entity information for the merchant, when available from public data sources.

foundingDate.description: Year or date of company founding.

stockListings.description: All known stock exchange listings for this entity.

DataSource.title: Data Source Reference
DataSource.description: A data source used to compute the trust assessment.

url.description: URL of the data source or the specific query used.

lastChecked.description: Date when this data source was last queried (ISO 8601 date).
